LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANTS TITO AVILA, TITO AVILA, FRANK HOWARD ALLEN REALTORS-SAN FRANCISCO'S NOTICE OF MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS; REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED IN PART, DENIED IN PART. THE COMPLAINT WAS FILED WITHIN 2 YEARS OF DISCOVERY OF THE CLAIMS. CAUSES OF ACTION 3 TO 7 ARE PLED WITH SUFFICIENT PARTICULARITY AND STATE CAUSES OF ACTION. THE 1ST AND 2ND CAUSES OF ACTION ARE BARRED BY STATUTE OF FRAUD IN THAT THEY ARE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF A BROKERAGE CONTRACT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
